title: malva grandiflora
intro: Malva grandiflora, also known as the large mallow, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malva grandiflora include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or infusco, and is also used in the form of tinctures, ointments, and salves for topical application.
